reviews.comment:
Me quisieron cobrar un 12% extra al total de la carga para hacer factura A, unos delincuentes!!!

(Translated by Google)
They tried to charge me an extra 12% on top of the total charge to issue an invoice A, criminals!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZNUpiUTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los empleados. El kiosco - bar muy completo y los que atienden son muy amables.los baños impecables de libre acceso

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. The kiosk-bar is very well stocked, and the waiters are very friendly. The bathrooms are spotless and freely accessible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZa04zRVdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar accecible para cargar.En temporada ir con paciencia.

(Translated by Google)
Accessible place to charge. During the season, be patient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvbDllTER3EAE

reviews.comment:
Como toda estación ACA de YPF en buen estado y mantenimiento. En épocas de temporada...paciencia para cargar combustible solamente..la atención es muy buenas los playeros super atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA YPF stations, it's in good condition and well-maintained. During peak season... just be patient when filling up... the service is very good, the attendants are super attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdjRudndnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero todo muy caro $

(Translated by Google)
Good service but everything is very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbl9mQkJREAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios, atención cordial, en época alta mucha demanda para cargar provocando filas largas e incómodas de vehículos.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms, friendly service, but during peak season there is high demand for charging, causing long and uncomfortable lines of vehicles.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvejhESzV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena en general, suele haber mucha demanda para cargar combustible durante la temporada alta y eso genera tiempos de espera largos. Los baños están en condiciones y la tienda tiene variedad de productos, aunque se encuentra cerrada durante la noche.

(Translated by Google)
Service is generally good; fuel demand is often high during peak season, leading to long wait times. The restrooms are in good condition, and the store has a variety of products, although it is closed at night.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvN3JmNjV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Good service.

(Translated by Google)
The service to members is always spectacular.

VERY good service

reviews.comment:
Atención cordial, un poco desordenado el tema de la fila, ya que nadie controla que se respete el orden de llegada para realizar la carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Friendly service, but the line is a bit messy, as no one is checking to ensure fuel is in the order of arrival.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvc05ET2xRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se hacen filas larguísimas para cargar combustible.
Los baños en varias oportunidades me paso que estuvieran clausurados por falta de agua. Tienen instalados afuera de la estación 2 baños químicos, parece que siempre les “falta el agua en el baño”.

(Translated by Google)
The lines to get fuel are incredibly long.
On several occasions, the restrooms have been closed due to a lack of water. They have two portable toilets outside the station, but it seems they're always short of water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbDh2ZF9BRRAB
